# Review submission artifact

Command-owned reviewer submission artifact.

- Schema JSON: [review-submission.schema.json](../../../../schema/artifacts/review-submission.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.ReviewSubmission`

## Root Shape

ReviewSubmission is the command-owned submission artifact for one reviewer slot.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dimension` | `string` | yes | Dimension is the human-readable review dimension label. |
| `findings` | `array<ReviewFinding> | null` | yes | Findings lists the review findings for the slot. |
| `round_id` | `string` | yes | RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round. |
| `slot` | `string` | yes | Slot is the stable slot identifier. |
| `submitted_at` | `string` | yes | SubmittedAt is the submission timestamp. |
| `summary` | `string` | yes | Summary is the reviewer's concise overall assessment. |

## Definitions

## ReviewFinding

ReviewFinding is one review finding in a submission or aggregate.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `details` | `string` | yes | Details is the full review finding explanation. |
| `severity` | `string` | yes | Severity is the finding severity label. |
| `title` | `string` | yes | Title is the short human-readable title of the finding. |

## ReviewSubmission

ReviewSubmission is the command-owned submission artifact for one reviewer slot.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dimension` | `string` | yes | Dimension is the human-readable review dimension label. |
